scripts.lint:packages: publint library && publint targets/react && attw --pack library --profile esm-only --entrypoints . dropdown && attw --pack targets/react --profile esm-only --entrypoints . button dropdown
scripts.release: pnpm --filter @fivenine-collective/ui build && pnpm --filter @fivenine-collective/react build && pnpm lint:packages && changeset publish
